prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KIDSGOLFCADDYSET-RED-KPVAR Product Type: TOYS_AND_GAMES Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: KidPlay Products Kids Toddler Outdoor Golf Club Pretend Play Set - Red Description: Learn to play golf just like Dad with the Kidplay Products Kids Golf Caddy Set.

Enhance your little kid’s imagination with this Kids Golfer Play Set. This golf caddy playset is perfect for your little ones when spending quality time with you or with their friends. It allows your kids to learn and have fun doing a pretend play with these golf tools and accessories.

Fun toy-set that promotes interest in the functionality of tools when playing golf. Non-toxic toys that are safe to use and these are perfect add ons for kids workshop, pretend play and party decorations. Includes 1 golf club holder that features wheels for easy transport, 3 golf balls, 3 types of clubs, and 2 practice holes. This golf pretend play-set will promote the development of a child’s hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills.

Made of high-quality materials that make this toy set strong and sturdy. These can withstand the bumps and crashes. Durable construction plastic toys that your kids will enjoy and creates a good time playing it outdoor or indoor. Recommended for ages 3 and above. Search Terms: toys toy golf kids golf kids sports child golf set Features: - GREAT PLAYTIME GAME FOR KIDS: Rounds of fun for anyone participating; 2 to 4 players can join in on the fun - PERFECT FUN FOR DEVELOPING SKILLS: Helps develop important motor skills and hand-eye coordination; can be used indoors or outdoors - COMPLETE KIDS GOLF PLAYSET: Includes everything needed to play gold just like dad; included are a Driver, Wedge and Putter. 3 balls, 3 clubs - DIMENSIONS: Approx. height of club holder: 20 inches · Approx. club length: 20 inches - AGE RANGE: Recommended for ages 3+ and up; Finished in bright, vivid colors === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay Products Kids Golf Caddy Set - Red
